description: Values returned by mail domain relay shared instance

outbound-host.description: IPv6 or IPv4 address for outbound SMTP

outbound-submission-port.description: SMTP submission port for password-authenticated outbound mail

outbound-password.description: Password for SASL authentication (only when authentication is 'password')

outbound-user.description: SASL username for authentication (only when authentication is 'password')
